element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation for all subsequent puzzle-platform challenges
Introduction to physics-based object interaction and weight concepts
Core mechanic requiring understanding of weight, balance, and toppling on slopes
Combat variety with multiple elimination strategies
Core progression requirement; finding and using objects to reach exits
Optional but helpful for managing danger scenarios
Temporary tactical advantage; resource management element
Requires mastery of physics, weight distribution, and spatial reasoning
Major skill checks requiring combat, timing, and puzzle-solving synthesis
Advanced challenges for completionists; 'HEROS' block collection, math puzzle solving

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating between platforming action sequences and puzzle-solving contemplation; training levels establish gentler pacing; complexity escalates through mid-game with layered physics puzzles; boss encounters punctuate progression with heightened tension

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret levels accessible via password system; bonus objects carrying score value; heart objects granting extra lives
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden areas containing blocks spelling 'HEROS'; secret cinematic endings triggered by specific achievements (leaving secret level with HEROS blocks, completing all 51 normal levels, playing 6 special secret levels obtained through math puzzle passwords)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction via 5 training levels teaching basic platforming and object physics; establishes false impression of simplicity per developer notes
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating complexity combining platforming, physics puzzles, and enemy encounters; multi-object stacking challenges; power-up management becomes relevant
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex physics-based puzzles requiring mastery of weight distribution, buoyancy, friction, and slope mechanics; boss encounters become more demanding; puzzle-action synthesis peaks
notable_spikes: Transition from training levels to main campaign (complexity jump from gentle tutorial to actual puzzle-platformer)
Early-to-mid game shift introducing stacking mechanics on varied terrain
Boss encounters throughout game serve as progression gates
Secret levels and 'HEROS' ending requiring meta-puzzle solving (math expressions in credits)

notable_level_patterns.description: Early levels teaching object behavior through isolated scenarios; weight variation emphasized; slope-based toppling consequences taught through trial-and-error
Action sequences combining platforming and enemy dodging with puzzle-solving requirements (object collection, placement) needed to progress
Thematic level with environmental and mechanic references (noted as reference to Wiz 'n' Liz); demonstrates diverse setting variety across 57-level span
Password-protected special stages with extreme difficulty; HEROS block collection variant; meta-puzzle integration (math equations in credits); only 6 of 16 secret levels mandatory for completion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: 6 special secret levels (16 secret levels total, not all required)

notable_level_patterns.description: 6 major boss encounters (9 in Mega-CD version) serve as skill checks; not all required for normal ending but gating achievement conditions
